chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text:
A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for a claim that:

(1) arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and

(2) relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.082 — Pilot Liability

A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for a claim that:

    (1) arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and

    (2) relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: A pilot is not liable directly or as a member of an organization of pilots for a claim that:
arises from an act or omission of another pilot or organization of pilots; and
relates directly or indirectly to pilot services.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
